news.headline: Fed's Musalem: Inflation has been higher than desired; there are worries about the job market being down.
Fed's Musalem: The risk that inflation won't cool fast enough has risen.
Novo secures A$11.5M from partial sale of securities.
S&P Global releases journal on AI impact, covers labor, energy transformation, Dec 2024. #SPGI #AI #labor #energy.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, S&P Global (NYSE: SPGI) released the most recent edition of its Look Forward research series. The report offers a thorough examination of the intricate nature of artificial intelligence (AI) and its revolutionary effects on the labor market, energy, and other sectors.

news.headline: Optiv praised in KuppingerCole's 2024 MDR report as Product Leader and Overall Challenger. Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: Optiv, a prominent cybersecurity advisory and solutions provider, has recently been recognized as a Product Leader and an Overall Challenger in the 2024 Managed Detection and Response (MDR) report by KuppingerCole Analysts. This acknowledgment showcases Optiv's esteemed position in the industry. The company received high praise for its innovative approach to MDR services, confirming its strong hold as a key player in the cybersecurity sector.

news.headline: Advisors Asset Management launches AAM SLC Low Duration Income ETF, its fourth ETF of the year.
news.summary: A new ETF called LODI has been introduced by Advisors Asset Management (AAM), marking the company's fourth ETF launch this year. This addition to their growing ETF suite was announced on December 4, 2024. AAM is recognized as a top investment solutions provider.

news.headline: DataXstream introduces OMS+ Cloud for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, streamlining sales processes. Gartner predicts rise in cloud spending.
news.summary: In Williamsburg, Virginia, DataXstream LLC, a Gold-level partner and SAP® Endorsed app developer, launched OMS+ Cloud for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. The software has successfully simplified sales and order processes for SAP users for more than 10 years in SAP ECC and S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition environments. Gartner's latest forecast indicates a substantial rise in global spending on public cloud services.

news.headline: TNS introduces new data optimization product for banks and hedge funds in Reston, VA.
news.summary: A new data optimization product has been launched by TNS in Reston, Virginia. The product is set to enhance data usage efficiency with its powerful capabilities. TNS introduced this advancement to cater to the growing demand for optimized data solutions in the modern business landscape. This launch signifies a significant development for the company as it aims to provide enhanced services to its clientele.

news.headline: 83% of financial advisors are happy after switching firms; 35% wish they did it sooner, driven by better tech search.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Advisor360 in Weston, Mass, revealed that 83% of financial advisors expressed satisfaction after transitioning to new firms. A significant 79% of respondents cited the pursuit of improved technology as the primary motivation behind their decision to switch companies.

news.headline: Overworld and Rough House Games launch REACH Labs, game publisher with proprietary platform, backed by a16z.
news.summary: A new game publisher, REACH Labs, has been launched in Los Angeles by Rough House Games, headed by Chris DeWolfe, who co-founded MySpace and Jam City, and supported by a16z and Overworld.

news.headline: MeridianLink in Costa Mesa, CA, certified as Great Place to Work for 5th time in a row.
news.summary: MeridianLink, Inc., based in Costa Mesa, California, has been recognized as a Great Place To Work® for the fifth year in a row. The company is proud to receive this certification, underscoring its commitment to providing a positive work environment for its employees.

news.headline: Roku CFO Dan Jedda to speak at UBS Global Media and Communications Conference on Dec 9 in NY at 10:30 AM ET. Watch live on Roku's IR site.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Roku, Inc. (NASDAQ: ROKU) disclosed that Chief Financial Officer Dan Jedda will partake in the UBS Global Media and Communications Conference in New York on December 9. Jedda will engage in a fireside conversation at 10:30 AM ET. Those interested can access the live webcast and replay on Roku’s Investor Relations site at https://www.roku.com/investor. Roku, Inc. is known for spearheading TV streaming services, connecting users to entertainment content.

news.headline: Veeam's valuation hits $15 billion after $2 billion equity offering led by TPG, with participation from Temasek and Neuberger Berman.
news.summary: In Seattle, Veeam has broadened its investor base through a $2 billion secondary equity offering. The offering was spearheaded by TPG and saw involvement from Temasek and Neuberger Berman Capital Solutions.

news.headline: Appfire recognized by Inc. as one of 2024 Best in Business List for strategic business model; based in Boston.
news.summary: Appfire, based in Boston, has experienced significant growth and influence due to its distinctive partner-centric strategy, strategic acquisitions, commitment to innovation, and prioritization of its employees. As of December 4, 2024, the company stands as the foremost global supplier of software aimed at improving, expanding, and linking various platforms. Through this approach, Appfire has seen remarkable success, with impressive numbers reflecting its expansion and positive impact in the industry.

news.headline: Axiad introduces Axiad Mesh to tackle identity risks for enterprises globally. Supports in identifying, quantifying, and remedying risks automatically. Improves security through fortified identities.
news.summary: A cutting-edge Identity Risk Management solution has been introduced to assist organizations in detecting, measuring, and automatically addressing risks, as well as enhancing identity protection for optimal security. The innovative solution, launched by Axiad in San Jose, California on December 4, 2024, aims to combat identity-related breaches effectively. This groundbreaking technology is designed to revolutionize the way organizations manage identity risks, providing them with enhanced capabilities to fortify identities and ensure maximum security.

news.headline: Hippo names Andrea Collins as CMO, boasting 20+ years of experience. HIPO stock announcement on Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: A home insurance company based in Palo Alto, California, known as Hippo (NYSE: HIPO), which specializes in proactive home protection, has recently named Andrea Collins as their Chief Marketing Officer. Collins brings over 20 years of marketing expertise to her new role at the company. The announcement was made on December 4, 2024. This move is expected to further strengthen the marketing strategies of Hippo and drive its growth in the home insurance sector.

news.headline: Colangelo & Partners acquires majority position in WineGlass Marketing, creating leading agency in the U.S. with offices in key cities.
news.summary: The recent acquisition has resulted in the formation of the top full-service wine and spirits agency in the United States. The agency now boasts offices in major cities including New York, San Francisco, Miami, Austin, and the newest addition located in Downtown Napa. This strategic move was announced in Napa, California on December 4, 2024. Colangelo & Partners, the renowned wine and spirits agency, solidified its position by this acquisition, expanding its reach and capabilities. For more information, visit www.colangelopr.com.

news.headline: Baby Shark and Sesame Street collaborate for a holiday special and merchandise; partnership extends to 2025 for Baby Shark's 10th anniversary.
news.summary: In anticipation of Baby Shark's upcoming 10th anniversary celebration in 2025, a collaboration has been announced between the beloved children's franchise and the iconic Sesame Street brand. This partnership will feature a holiday special and curated playlist, showcasing the combined efforts of these two cultural icons. Furthermore, the collaboration will extend into 2025 with the release of exclusive merchandise collection, tying in with the milestone event. Stay tuned for a variety of celebratory activities and products leading up to the grand anniversary in 2025.

news.headline: Crown Holdings, Inc. will receive $300M from the sale of Eviosys to Sonoco Products Company.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on December 4, 2024, Crown Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CCK) finalized the sale of Eviosys to Sonoco Products Company. As a result of this transaction, Crown will obtain around $300 million in net cash proceeds for its remaining equity stake.

news.headline: Cherry Bekaert acquires assets of DeBlanc, Murphy & Murphy LLC in strategic move to expand portfolio.
news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina on December 4, 2024, Cherry Bekaert revealed the acquisition of the majority of assets from DeBlanc, Murphy & Murphy, LLC, a prominent company focusing on accounting, tax, and advisory services. This strategic move is intended to enhance Cherry's capabilities in the sector.

news.headline: Truckstop and Reliance Partners team up to offer brokerages specialized insurance solutions in BOISE, Idaho as of Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: In Boise, Idaho on December 4, 2024, a partnership between Truckstop and Reliance Partners was announced to offer insurance solutions for brokerages. The aim is to safeguard brokerages and enhance operational efficiency with tailored insurance options. This collaboration introduces Truckstop RMIS™, a platform designed for this purpose, ensuring smooth operations for brokerages.

news.headline: Sobel Network Shipping Co., Inc. welcomes Richie Casarez to lead AOG operations and launch Dallas branch.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 4, 2024, Sobel Network Shipping Co., Inc. proudly announced the latest member of their team, Richie Casarez. Hailing from El Paso, TX, and having grown up in the Dallas/Fort Worth area, Richie brings with him three decades of local experience. Notably, he was active in the years 2002 to 2004.

news.headline: enSights secures $10M to grow AI-powered clean energy business, enters US market and enhances SaaS platform.
news.summary: enSights, a company specializing in AI-powered, cloud-based clean energy optimization and management platforms, has revealed plans to enter the US market and enhance its SaaS capabilities. The expansion was officially announced in Austin, Texas on December 4, 2024. As part of this strategic move, enSights successfully secured a total of $10 million through its Series A funding round. This financial boost aims to support the company's growth initiatives and further establish its presence in the clean energy sector.

news.headline: Self Research Institute and SafeWaters Foundation partner to launch platform & app to enhance maritime safety & reduce abusive labor practices on fishing vessels globally. 501(c)3 non-profit SRI leads this initiative as it aims to improve safety for crews and families.
news.summary: A recent collaboration has been established to enhance safety measures for fishing and maritime crews and their families. The Self Research Institute (SRI), a non-profit organization based in Broken Arrow, Oklahoma and renowned for its software solutions, unveiled its partnership. This initiative comes in light of the pressing need to provide better protection for individuals working at sea. The SRI is well-known for its groundbreaking research and development activities in the United States as a 501c3 entity. The partnership aims to address the safety concerns prevalent in the fishing and maritime industries, pledging to deliver crucial support for crew members and their loved ones. The announcement was made on December 4, 2024, marking a pivotal moment in the effort to ensure the well-being of those working in these challenging environments.

news.headline: Safenet introduced to drive onchain activity, aiming to boost $100 trillion global economy, from Zug, Switzerland, on Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: Aiming to streamline cross-chain interactions, boost on-chain activity, and facilitate wider adoption, the Safe Ecosystem Foundation, based in ZUG, Switzerland, revealed on December 4, 2024 the introduction of Safenet. The foundation, managing the community of Safe (formerly Gnosis Safe), is leading this initiative.

news.headline: Oceania Cruises has installed Starlink internet on entire fleet, ensuring access for all guests.
news.summary: In Miami on December 4, 2024, Oceania Cruises®, a prominent cruise line known for its culinary and destination-centric approach, disclosed the successful implementation of Starlink, the largest satellite constellation globally, across all its vessels. This installation ensures that all passengers, numbering in the thousands, now have access to...

news.headline: BTL partners with Alo Yoga Wellness Clubs, bringing advanced wellness solutions to customers globally.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, based in Marlborough, Massachusetts, BTL revealed its exciting partnership with Alo Wellness Clubs, known for its private wellness offerings. The collaboration will bring BTL's cutting-edge Emsculpt Neo and Emsella technologies to Alo's facilities, enhancing their health solutions variety.

news.headline: Beazley Security hires Stephanie Webb and Jason Deering to drive growth in key markets in US and Europe.
news.summary: In a recent development on December 4, 2024, Beazley Security based in West Hartford, Connecticut, revealed the recruitment of Stephanie Webb and Jason Deering as the latest additions to their leadership team. The primary objective behind this decision is to facilitate the corporation's growth initiatives and expansion into essential markets. Stephanie Webb will be responsible for overseeing sales operations in the UK while Jason Deering's role will involve driving expansion strategies in other geographic regions. This strategic move aligns with Beazley Security's ambitions to further establish a strong presence in key markets.

news.headline: Magma Math receives grant from Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation to develop AI tools for math education in underserved communities.
news.summary: The Bill & Melinda Gates Foundation is investing in a two-year project focused on underserved communities in educational technology. Magma Math, a prominent player in this field, aims to improve math instruction through AI-powered tools. This initiative, announced on December 4, 2024, demonstrates a commitment to investing in innovative solutions for education. The project is set to receive a significant amount of funding to support its mission, emphasizing the Foundation's dedication to addressing the needs of marginalized communities.

news.headline: Penske Logistics wins Toyota North America Service Outbound Award for exceptional work in automotive supply chain.
news.summary: Penske Logistics, based in Reading, Pennsylvania, received the prestigious 2024 Service Outbound Award from Toyota North America for their exceptional work in the automotive aftermarket supply chain. The award was presented during Toyota's supplier conference in Plano, Texas. This recognition highlights Penske Logistics' leading position in the industry.

news.headline: Oterra expands in US with 155,000 sq ft (14,400 m2) hub in Wis to address demand for natural colors.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Mt. Pleasant, Wisconsin, Oterra, a prominent provider of natural colors for the food and beverage industry, announced plans to enhance its presence in the United States. They are establishing a cutting-edge innovation, collaboration, and production facility spanning 155,000 square feet (14,400 square meters) in Mt. Pleasant, WI.

news.headline: New STōK Decaf Cold Brew Coffee eliminates coffee curfew, making it 1st in stores, available in unsweet & not too sweet options. #DecafRevolution
news.summary: A new STōK Cold Brew Coffee product has been launched with a fresh white label design in Louisville, Colorado, on December 4, 2024. This latest offering is unique as it is the first decaffeinated cold brew available for purchase in grocery stores. The product comes in two variations: Unsweet and Not Too Sweet, catering to different taste preferences. This development provides consumers with more choice in the ready-to-drink coffee market.

news.headline: Man Group PLC amends announcement on Direct Line Insurance Group plc, replacing the previous release from 29 November 2024 at 12:04.
news.summary: This updated announcement supersedes the previous release issued at 12:04 on November 29, 2024. Changes have been made to section 2(a), while all other details remain the same.

news.headline: Organ-on-chip technology offers cost-effective and ethical drug development solutions. Challenges include high costs and regulatory barriers, hindering widespread adoption. Lung-on-chip models are expected to lead the market, reaching USD 980 million by 2033. Regulatory advancements, like the FDA Modernization Act 2.0, support organ-on-chip integration into pharmaceutical research. Furthermore, polydimethylsiloxane (PDMS) segment is projected to generate USD 700 million by 2033.
news.summary: Organ-on-chip technology is set to revolutionize pharmaceutical and healthcare industries by offering more accurate and cost-effective platforms for research. These devices mimic human organs, reducing the reliance on animal testing and improving drug discovery processes. However, challenges like high costs, regulatory hurdles, and lack of awareness hinder widespread adoption. The organs-on-chip market is growing significantly, with lung-on-chip models leading in revenue generation, expected to reach USD 980 million by 2033. Regulatory advancements, like the FDA Modernization Act 2.0, are supporting the integration of organ-on-chip technologies into drug development, further enhancing their adoption. Broad research, collaboration, and regulatory support are necessary to make these devices more accessible worldwide and accelerate the development of new therapies.

news.headline: Global lucid dreaming devices market expected to exceed $196.8 million by 2034 due to rising consciousness and therapeutic uses. Key players include iBand+, NeuroOn, and iWinks. Technology advancements and awareness drive market growth.
news.summary: The global lucid dreaming devices market, valued at US$113.7 million in 2023, is expected to reach US$196.8 million by 2034 with a 5.1% compound annual growth rate (CAGR). Lucid dreaming devices, including wearable and non-wearable tools, utilize advanced technology like brainwave monitoring and biofeedback loops to enhance dream lucidity. Leading players in this market include iBand+, NeuroOn, iWinks, LLC, and others. Lucid dreaming is gaining popularity for its therapeutic potential, aiding in overcoming nightmares and providing insights into personal challenges. Advancements in technology and increased awareness about the benefits of lucid dreaming are driving market growth, with studies showing improved mental health and problem-solving skills amongst users.

news.headline: Pinnacle Financial Partners named one of America’s best workplaces for parents, ranking No.21 on the 2024 list.
news.summary: In Nashville, Tennessee, Pinnacle Financial Partners has once again proven itself as a top workplace for parents by securing the No. 21 spot on the 2024 Best Workplaces for Parents list by Great Place to Work®. This marks the firm's sixth time making the list, showcasing their dedication to supporting families. The rankings are based on anonymous surveys from employees, specifically comparing responses from parents and non-parents. This recognition underscores Pinnacle's commitment to fostering a supportive and inclusive work environment for all its associates.

news.headline: Boundless Rider expands to Pennsylvania, offering motorcycle insurance to 1.7 million US riders with customizable policies and crash detection.
news.summary: Boundless Rider Insurance Agency, LLC, an insurtech company, has introduced affordable and customizable policies with in-app crash detection and emergency response coordination to 1.7 million riders across the United States. This option provides enhanced protection and convenience for users, as announced in Boston on December 4, 2024.

news.headline: ARRAY Technologies and RP have deployed over 6GW of solar power, surpassing a significant milestone.
AIM signs 5-year deal with CME for live automatic captions on 6 European TV stations.
news.summary: AI-Media is excited to share news of a significant partnership with Central European Media Enterprises (CME). This agreement spans a period of 5 years and will involve the delivery of live automatic captions to 6 TV stations in Europe.

news.headline: AXA XL names Russell Caminske as East Zone CRL and Ryan Larson as West Zone CRL in the U.S.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, AXA XL announced the appointment of two new Client Relationship Leaders (CRL) in the U.S. Russell Caminske will serve as the East Zone CRL, while Ryan Larson will take on the role of the West Zone CRL. This move underscores AXA XL's dedication to delivering top-notch service and personalized solutions to its clients.

news.headline: Advantech expands x86 series with AMD EPYC™ and Ryzen™ processors to boost Edge Cloud and Network Security.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, in Taipei, Advantech, a prominent supplier of edge computing solutions, announced the enhancement of its x86 series platforms by incorporating AMD EPYC™ and Ryzen™ series processors. These platform expansions cater to servers, motherboards, and networks, offering versatile options for edge computing and security needs.

news.headline: BDA acquires SwagUp, a promotional products management platform, to expand operations and technical capabilities.
news.summary: A well-known branded merchandise agency is set to enhance its presence and strengthen its technical abilities by acquiring new assets. Bensussen Deutsch & Associates LLC (BDA), the top Merchandise Agency™ for major corporations, announced this move from its headquarters in Woodinville, Washington on December 4, 2024. This strategic acquisition is intended to further establish BDA's standing in the industry and better cater to the needs of Fortune 1000 enterprise companies.

news.headline: Craig Schneider appointed as Oppenheimer's Regional Director of Michigan, brings 25+ years of experience. Firm strengthens presence in several states.
news.summary: Experienced in wealth management, a veteran with more than 25 years in the industry has recently been appointed, adding to the firm's recent momentum in enhancing its presence in key states such as Virginia, Georgia, Tennessee, and Texas. The appointment comes as Oppenheimer & Co. Inc. (Oppenheimer) continues to strengthen its position in the market. This move aligns with the company's strategy to bolster its operations and further solidify its foothold in the industry.

news.headline: PlainID's Authorizer for Snowflake now available on its Platform, enhancing data access solutions. #IdentitySecurity #Authorization #Snowflake
news.summary: The PlainID Authorizer for Snowflake is now being offered through the PlainID Platform by the global provider of Identity Security, PlainID. This introduction was made on Dec. 4, 2024, in Tel Aviv, Israel, and New York. PlainID is recognized as the Enterprise Authorization Leader and aims to enhance security measures. For further details on how PlainID safeguards information, interested individuals can access the platform.

news.headline: Global market for Agricultural Microbials was $11.3B in 2023, projected to reach $26.4B by 2030, growing at 12.9% CAGR.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report on the global market for Agricultural Microbials has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market was valued at US$11.3 billion in 2023 and is anticipated to reach US$26.4 billion by 2030, with a projected growth rate of 12.9% from 2023 to 2030. This detailed report offers insights into market trends, drivers, and future forecasts to assist in making strategic business decisions. The agricultural microbial sector is expected to experience significant growth in the coming years.

news.headline: S&P Dow Jones Indices and UBS launch S&P UBS Leveraged Loan Indices formerly known as Credit Suisse Indices.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, S&P Dow Jones Indices (S&P DJI) and UBS revealed the introduction of the S&P UBS Leveraged Loan Indices in partnership, replacing the former Credit Suisse Leveraged Loan Indices. This initiative marks a significant development in the financial sector and will serve as a key tool for measuring various aspects related to leveraged loans. This collaboration between S&P DJI and UBS aims to provide comprehensive insights into the market trends, with the indices designed to offer valuable data for investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Ro's new research finds patients in RO Body membership lose 15.8% of body weight on average in 12 months; 80% improved lab results with metabolic health risks.
news.summary: In a recent study conducted in New York, it was found that 80% of patients with metabolic health risks experienced significant improvements in their laboratory results after a year. The study was conducted by Ro, a prominent direct-to-patient healthcare company. The research focused on patients who were undergoing treatment with a GLP-1 medication. This data highlights the effectiveness of the treatment in managing metabolic health issues.

news.headline: Insurers see trillion-dollar opportunity in offering guaranteed income options in target date funds for 401(k) plans.
news.summary: In Hartford, Connecticut on December 4, 2024, it was reported that there is a shifting trend among 401(k) plan members towards seeking guaranteed income (GI) options in addition to retirement asset accumulation. A significant number of participants are showing interest in incorporating GI into Target Date Funds (TDFs), suggesting a demand for more secure income streams in retirement planning.

news.headline: PepsiCo Foundation & NRAEF join hands in $1M partnership to expand workforce training in US cities.
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, the PepsiCo Foundation and the National Restaurant Association Educational Foundation (NRAEF) revealed a new collaboration to extend job-readiness training programs for the restaurant and hospitality sectors to additional cities in the United States. The partnership intends to introduce training initiatives in various regions to address workforce needs and support the growth of the industry. This initiative is expected to impact a significant number of individuals seeking employment opportunities within the restaurant and hospitality fields.

news.headline: D-Fend Solutions secures $31M investment to enhance cyber counter-drone tech, solidifying market leadership.
news.summary: Israel Growth Partners recently headed an investment round for D-Fend Solutions, solidifying the company's innovative stance at the crossroads of defense technology, drones, cyber, and AI. This event took place on December 4, 2024, in Ra'anana, Israel, and McLean, Virginia. The move underscores D-Fend Solutions' expertise in radio frequency (RF) technology, as they continue to make strides in these interconnected sectors.
